requirement_topic.en: Energy Efficiency — NEECA Minimum Energy Performance Standards (MEPS) for Refrigerators
requirement_topic.zh: 能效——NEECA电冰箱最低能效标准（MEPS）
requirement_topic.zht: 能效——NEECA電冰箱最低能效標準（MEPS）

summary.en: Energy efficiency of household refrigerating appliances in Pakistan is regulated by the National Energy Efficiency and Conservation Authority (NEECA, established under the NEECA Act, 2016, successor to ENERCON). NEECA develops and rolls out Minimum Energy Performance Standards (MEPS) and energy-efficiency labelling for major appliances, including refrigerators, as part of Pakistan's Standards and Labelling (S&L) programme. Refrigerators offered on the Pakistan market are expected to meet the applicable MEPS threshold (a minimum energy-efficiency level below which a model may not be sold) and to be tested by methods that NEECA adopts from the IEC 62552 household-refrigerator test series. Because Pakistan's S&L programme is being phased in by appliance category, exporters must confirm the current in-force MEPS threshold, effective date, and required test method for refrigerators directly with NEECA before relying on it.
summary.zh: 巴基斯坦家用制冷器具的能效由国家能效与节约局（NEECA，依据2016年NEECA法案设立，为ENERCON的继任机构）监管。NEECA作为巴基斯坦标准与标识（S&L）计划的一部分，为包括电冰箱在内的主要器具制定并推行最低能效标准（MEPS）及能效标识。在巴基斯坦市场销售的电冰箱应满足适用的MEPS门槛（低于该能效水平的型号不得销售），并按NEECA从IEC 62552家用电冰箱测试系列采用的方法进行测试。由于巴基斯坦S&L计划按器具类别分阶段推行，出口商在依赖之前须直接向NEECA确认电冰箱当前生效的MEPS门槛、生效日期及所需测试方法。
summary.zht: 巴基斯坦家用製冷器具的能效由國家能效與節約局（NEECA，依據2016年NEECA法案設立，為ENERCON的繼任機構）監管。NEECA作為巴基斯坦標準與標識（S&L）計畫的一部分，為包括電冰箱在內的主要器具制定並推行最低能效標準（MEPS）及能效標識。在巴基斯坦市場銷售的電冰箱應滿足適用的MEPS門檻（低於該能效水平的型號不得銷售），並按NEECA從IEC 62552家用電冰箱測試系列採用的方法進行測試。由於巴基斯坦S&L計畫按器具類別分階段推行，出口商在依賴之前須直接向NEECA確認電冰箱當前生效的MEPS門檻、生效日期及所需測試方法。

standards_or_laws: NEECA Act, 2016 — legal basis for the National Energy Efficiency and Conservation Authority and its Standards & Labelling programme
NEECA Minimum Energy Performance Standards (MEPS) for refrigerators — confirm current in-force threshold and effective date with NEECA
Pakistan Standard adopting IEC 62552 (Household refrigerating appliances — characteristics and test methods) — test-method basis where adopted

summary.en: China's mandatory energy-efficiency standard for household refrigerators is GB 12021.2-2015 (Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators), establishing energy-efficiency grades (Grade 1 most efficient, Grade 5 the minimum threshold) and minimum annual energy-consumption limits. It is mandatory, enforced by SAMR, with the China Energy Label administered under NDRC/SAMR; test methods follow GB/T 8059-2016, aligned with the IEC 62552 series. A Chinese model therefore already has an energy grade and annual-consumption figure, but these are calculated under China's grade framework, not under Pakistan's MEPS threshold, so a Chinese Grade-1/Grade-2 rating does not automatically demonstrate that a model meets Pakistan's MEPS pass level.
summary.zh: 中国家用电冰箱的强制性能效标准为GB 12021.2-2015（家用电冰箱耗电量限定值及能效等级），规定能效等级（1级最高效，5级为最低门槛）及年耗电量最低限值。该标准为强制性，由SAMR执行，中国能效标识由NDRC/SAMR管理；测试方法采用GB/T 8059-2016，与IEC 62552系列对齐。因此中国型号已具备能效等级和年耗电量数值，但这些是在中国等级框架下计算的，而非按巴基斯坦MEPS门槛，故中国1级/2级评定不自动证明某型号达到巴基斯坦MEPS合格水平。
summary.zht: 中國家用電冰箱的強制性能效標準為GB 12021.2-2015（家用電冰箱耗電量限定值及能效等級），規定能效等級（1級最高效，5級為最低門檻）及年耗電量最低限值。該標準為強制性，由SAMR執行，中國能效標識由NDRC/SAMR管理；測試方法採用GB/T 8059-2016，與IEC 62552系列對齊。因此中國型號已具備能效等級和年耗電量數值，但這些是在中國等級框架下計算的，而非按巴基斯坦MEPS門檻，故中國1級/2級評定不自動證明某型號達到巴基斯坦MEPS合格水平。

standards_or_laws: GB 12021.2-2015 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators (mandatory; SAMR/NDRC China Energy Label)
GB/T 8059-2016 — Household and similar refrigerating appliances (test method; aligned with IEC 62552 series)

gap.en: Two gaps: (1) Different pass criterion — Pakistan's NEECA MEPS sets a minimum energy-performance pass level for refrigerators, calculated and verified under NEECA's adopted methodology (IEC 62552 basis), which is not the same as China's GB 12021.2 grade framework; a model compliant in China must be checked against Pakistan's specific MEPS threshold and may require recalculation/verification to the IEC 62552 test basis NEECA uses. (2) Test-data acceptance — exporters should confirm with NEECA whether existing IEC 62552-based test reports (e.g., from an ILAC MRA laboratory) are accepted for the Pakistan label/MEPS registration, and whether testing must be done or witnessed locally. Because Pakistan's appliance S&L programme is rolling out by category and revising thresholds, the current MEPS value, effective date, and any transition period for refrigerators must be verified directly with NEECA before shipment — values should not be assumed from older sources.
gap.zh: 两项差距：（1）合格判定不同——巴基斯坦NEECA MEPS为电冰箱设定最低能效合格水平，按NEECA采用的方法（IEC 62552基础）计算和验证，与中国GB 12021.2等级框架不同；在中国合规的型号须对照巴基斯坦具体MEPS门槛核查，并可能须按NEECA使用的IEC 62552测试基础重新计算/验证。（2）检测数据接受度——出口商应向NEECA确认现有基于IEC 62552的检测报告（如来自ILAC MRA实验室）是否被接受用于巴基斯坦标识/MEPS登记，以及测试是否须在当地进行或见证。由于巴基斯坦器具S&L计划按类别推行并修订门槛，电冰箱当前MEPS值、生效日期及任何过渡期须在出货前直接向NEECA核实——不应依据旧资料假定数值。
gap.zht: 兩項差距：（1）合格判定不同——巴基斯坦NEECA MEPS為電冰箱設定最低能效合格水平，按NEECA採用的方法（IEC 62552基礎）計算和驗證，與中國GB 12021.2等級框架不同；在中國合規的型號須對照巴基斯坦具體MEPS門檻核查，並可能須按NEECA使用的IEC 62552測試基礎重新計算/驗證。（2）檢測數據接受度——出口商應向NEECA確認現有基於IEC 62552的檢測報告（如來自ILAC MRA實驗室）是否被接受用於巴基斯坦標識/MEPS登記，以及測試是否須在當地進行或見證。由於巴基斯坦器具S&L計畫按類別推行並修訂門檻，電冰箱當前MEPS值、生效日期及任何過渡期須在出貨前直接向NEECA核實——不應依據舊資料假定數值。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where in force — refrigerators must meet the applicable NEECA MEPS pass level under Pakistan's Standards & Labelling programme; confirm the current in-force threshold and effective date with NEECA
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 12021.2-2015 energy grade compliance required before sale in China; administered by SAMR/NDRC

source.publisher: National Energy Efficiency and Conservation Authority (NEECA), Pakistan

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Pakistan regulates refrigerator energy efficiency through NEECA's MEPS under its Standards & Labelling programme, with test methods adopted from the IEC 62552 series. A Chinese GB 12021.2 grade does not automatically prove Pakistan MEPS compliance — verify the current MEPS threshold, effective date, and accepted test-report route directly with NEECA before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 巴基斯坦通过NEECA在其标准与标识计划下的MEPS监管电冰箱能效，测试方法采用IEC 62552系列。中国GB 12021.2等级不自动证明符合巴基斯坦MEPS——出货前请直接向NEECA核实当前MEPS门槛、生效日期及被接受的检测报告路径。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 巴基斯坦通過NEECA在其標準與標識計畫下的MEPS監管電冰箱能效，測試方法採用IEC 62552系列。中國GB 12021.2等級不自動證明符合巴基斯坦MEPS——出貨前請直接向NEECA核實當前MEPS門檻、生效日期及被接受的檢測報告路徑。

requirement_topic.en: Energy Labelling — NEECA Energy-Efficiency Label (Star Rating) for Refrigerators
requirement_topic.zh: 能效标识——NEECA电冰箱能效标签（星级评定）
requirement_topic.zht: 能效標識——NEECA電冰箱能效標籤（星級評定）

summary.en: Under NEECA's Standards and Labelling (S&L) programme, refrigerators sold in Pakistan are expected to carry the NEECA energy-efficiency label, which communicates the model's efficiency to consumers (a star-rating / comparative label showing energy class and indicative annual energy consumption). The label is based on the same IEC 62552 test methodology adopted for MEPS, and the model's labelled class must correspond to verified test data. Suppliers/importers are responsible for ensuring the correct label is applied to the appliance at the point of sale. Because the S&L scheme is being phased in by appliance category, the exact label format, registration step, and the date from which the refrigerator label becomes mandatory must be confirmed with NEECA; there is no EU-style central pre-market product database (no EPREL equivalent) — labelling is administered nationally by NEECA.
summary.zh: 在NEECA标准与标识（S&L）计划下，在巴基斯坦销售的电冰箱应附贴NEECA能效标签，向消费者传达型号能效（显示能效等级及指示性年耗电量的星级/比较型标签）。该标签基于与MEPS相同的IEC 62552测试方法，型号标注的等级须与经验证的测试数据相符。供应商/进口商负责确保在销售点为器具贴附正确标签。由于S&L方案按器具类别分阶段推行，确切的标签格式、登记步骤及电冰箱标签强制生效日期须向NEECA确认；不存在欧盟式中央上市前产品数据库（无EPREL等同物）——标识由NEECA在国家层面管理。
summary.zht: 在NEECA標準與標識（S&L）計畫下，在巴基斯坦銷售的電冰箱應附貼NEECA能效標籤，向消費者傳達型號能效（顯示能效等級及指示性年耗電量的星級/比較型標籤）。該標籤基於與MEPS相同的IEC 62552測試方法，型號標注的等級須與經驗證的測試數據相符。供應商/進口商負責確保在銷售點為器具貼附正確標籤。由於S&L方案按器具類別分階段推行，確切的標籤格式、登記步驟及電冰箱標籤強制生效日期須向NEECA確認；不存在歐盟式中央上市前產品數據庫（無EPREL等同物）——標識由NEECA在國家層面管理。

standards_or_laws: NEECA Act, 2016 — basis for the energy-efficiency labelling (Standards & Labelling) programme
NEECA energy-efficiency label (star rating) for refrigerators — confirm format, registration step, and mandatory date with NEECA
Pakistan Standard adopting IEC 62552 — test-method basis underlying the labelled class

summary.en: China's energy-labelling for household refrigerators is the China Energy Label (CEL) under the Measures for the Administration of Energy Efficiency Labels (NDRC/SAMR, 2016 revision), displaying a 1-to-5 grade and annual energy consumption, administered with the China National Institute of Standardization (CNIS) under NDRC/SAMR. The grade is self-declared by the manufacturer based on GB 12021.2 testing; there is no central pre-market product database. The Chinese CEL label cannot be used as the Pakistan label: the NEECA label is a distinct national label with its own class scale and format, so a Chinese model must carry the NEECA label (not the CEL) for the Pakistan market.
summary.zh: 中国家用电冰箱的能效标识为中国能效标识（CEL），依据《能源效率标识管理办法》（NDRC/SAMR，2016年修订），展示1至5级评级及年耗电量，由NDRC/SAMR下属中国标准化研究院（CNIS）协同管理。等级由制造商依据GB 12021.2检测自我声明；无中央上市前产品数据库。中国CEL标识不能用作巴基斯坦标签：NEECA标签是具有自身等级标度和格式的独立国家标签，故中国型号在巴基斯坦市场须附贴NEECA标签（而非CEL）。
summary.zht: 中國家用電冰箱的能效標識為中國能效標識（CEL），依據《能源效率標識管理辦法》（NDRC/SAMR，2016年修訂），展示1至5級評級及年耗電量，由NDRC/SAMR下屬中國標準化研究院（CNIS）協同管理。等級由製造商依據GB 12021.2檢測自我聲明；無中央上市前產品數據庫。中國CEL標識不能用作巴基斯坦標籤：NEECA標籤是具有自身等級標度和格式的獨立國家標籤，故中國型號在巴基斯坦市場須附貼NEECA標籤（而非CEL）。

standards_or_laws: Measures for the Administration of Energy Efficiency Labels (NDRC/SAMR 2016 revision) — China Energy Label framework
GB 12021.2-2015 — underlying grade standard for the China Energy Label

gap.en: The Chinese CEL label does not satisfy Pakistan's labelling obligation: (1) Distinct label — the NEECA energy label has its own class scale, format, and language; the model must carry the NEECA label, and its declared class must match verified IEC 62552-based test data; the Chinese 1-to-5 CEL grade is not transferable to the NEECA scale without recalculation. (2) No EPREL-style database — unlike the EU, Pakistan has no central pre-market product registry, so the obligation is on the supplier/importer to apply the correct label rather than to pre-register in a database; the exporter should coordinate with the Pakistan importer on who generates the label and on what evidence. (3) Phase-in uncertainty — the date from which the refrigerator label is mandatory, the exact label artwork, and any registration/notification step must be confirmed with NEECA, since the S&L scheme is being rolled out by category and revised over time.
gap.zh: 中国CEL标识不满足巴基斯坦标识义务：（1）独立标签——NEECA能效标签有自身的等级标度、格式和语言；型号须附贴NEECA标签，其声明等级须与经验证的基于IEC 62552的测试数据相符；中国1至5级CEL等级未经重新计算不可转换为NEECA标度。（2）无EPREL式数据库——与欧盟不同，巴基斯坦无中央上市前产品登记库，故义务在于供应商/进口商贴附正确标签，而非在数据库预注册；出口商应与巴基斯坦进口商协调由谁生成标签及依据何种证据。（3）分阶段推行的不确定性——电冰箱标签强制生效日期、确切标签图样及任何登记/通报步骤须向NEECA确认，因S&L方案按类别推行并随时间修订。
gap.zht: 中國CEL標識不滿足巴基斯坦標識義務：（1）獨立標籤——NEECA能效標籤有自身的等級標度、格式和語言；型號須附貼NEECA標籤，其聲明等級須與經驗證的基於IEC 62552的測試數據相符；中國1至5級CEL等級未經重新計算不可轉換為NEECA標度。（2）無EPREL式數據庫——與歐盟不同，巴基斯坦無中央上市前產品登記庫，故義務在於供應商/進口商貼附正確標籤，而非在數據庫預登記；出口商應與巴基斯坦進口商協調由誰生成標籤及依據何種證據。（3）分階段推行的不確定性——電冰箱標籤強制生效日期、確切標籤圖樣及任何登記/通報步驟須向NEECA確認，因S&L方案按類別推行並隨時間修訂。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where in force — refrigerators sold in Pakistan must carry the NEECA energy-efficiency label once the category label is in force; no EU-style central product database (no EPREL equivalent); confirm mandatory date and format with NEECA
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — China Energy Label display required before sale in China under NDRC/SAMR Measures; based on GB 12021.2-2015

source.publisher: National Energy Efficiency and Conservation Authority (NEECA), Pakistan

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Pakistan requires the NEECA energy-efficiency label for refrigerators under its Standards & Labelling programme; the Chinese China Energy Label does not satisfy this and is not transferable. There is no EPREL-style pre-market database — the supplier/importer applies the correct NEECA label based on IEC 62552 test data. Confirm the mandatory date, format, and any registration step with NEECA before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 巴基斯坦在其标准与标识计划下要求电冰箱附贴NEECA能效标签；中国能效标识不满足此要求且不可转换。不存在EPREL式上市前数据库——由供应商/进口商依据IEC 62552测试数据贴附正确的NEECA标签。出货前请向NEECA确认强制日期、格式及任何登记步骤。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 巴基斯坦在其標準與標識計畫下要求電冰箱附貼NEECA能效標籤；中國能效標識不滿足此要求且不可轉換。不存在EPREL式上市前數據庫——由供應商/進口商依據IEC 62552測試數據貼附正確的NEECA標籤。出貨前請向NEECA確認強制日期、格式及任何登記步驟。
